potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall start when it is not in use.
The system shall allow dialing a number only after sufficient credit has been added.
The system shall start the call when the dialed number is valid and the other party answers.
The system shall continue the call as long as there is sufficient credit.
The system shall end the call if the credit runs out during the call.
The system shall return to an unused state after a call ends.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: When someone picks up the receiver, they need to insert coins. Once enough credit is added, they can dial a number.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow dialing a number only after sufficient credit has been added.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: If the number is valid, the call starts when the other person answers.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall start the call when the dialed number is valid and the other party answers.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start when it is not in use.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not explicitly state that the phone starts only when it is not being used, but rather implies this behavior.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall continue the call as long as there is sufficient credit.
hallucinations.reason: The source text states that the call continues 'as long as there is enough credit', which does not necessarily imply it will continue indefinitely.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow adding more coins to continue the call.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall return any unused coins when the user hangs up.
duplicates.reason: These requirements are not duplicates but should be evaluated for redundancy.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall start when it is not in use.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous as it does not specify the context or conditions under which the phone starts.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall return to an unused state after a call ends.
ambiguities.reason: While implied, this is not explicitly stated in the source text and could be considered an assumption.
